## 

The Q²M OdorRemover Pads feature innovative technology that effectively encapsulates and eliminates unpleasant odors from any interior. Whether in a vehicle, boat, aircraft, or home, these pads provide long-lasting odour removal for several months, ensuring a fresh and clean atmosphere.

The Q²M OdorRemover Pads go beyond masking unpleasant odorus like typical air fresheners. Utilising active particles from our regular OdorRemover, it effectively encapsulates and eliminates odours while remaining neutral to your interior. This makes it an ideal solution for automotive spaces with children or pets, as well as in any enclosed environments such as homes, offices, boats, and airplanes. 

The Purify line effectively controls anti-bacterial growth and bio-hazard nuisances without compromising your health or environment, thanks to its 100% natural formulation. It's versatility extends beyond vehicle interiors; it’s also an ideal solution for homes, offices, and businesses. This innovative technology, a first in the automotive industry, sets a new standard for anti-bacterial surface protection and opens up exciting opportunities for detailing studios and car washes. 

**Size:** 4 pack
